since_last: 60% of 89 AI names green; Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical leads +2.67%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 60% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.18% · BTC -1.58% · Gold +0.53% · Nasdaq100 +2.25%. 60% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical is doing the heavy lifting at +2.67%.

cards.headline: Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at +2.67%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.10%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AVAV is the standout at +35.18%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +35.18%, AMAT +3.21%, LRCX +2.93%, OKLO +2.10%, OKLO +2.10%. Laggards: DLR -4.24%, TTD -2.68%, HON -1.38%, MDB -1.24%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.12% at $164.0
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.12% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
